title: Hydrophobe
body:
# Hydrophobe

A simple Minecraft mod that adds two active liquid-repelling blocks: the *Hydrophobe* for water and *Magmaphobe* for lava, each with a configurable range up to 8 blocks away from themselves. Consider this a spiritual successor to the [OpenBlocks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/openblocks) Sponge from the 1.7/1.12 days, but with significantly less lag.

Requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).
